All HDPE bottles are durable and come supplied with robust caps to prevent leaks. Suitable for general purpose laboratory and liquid storage applications such as collecting samples and containing working solutions like buffers, bench reagents and dilute chemical aliquots. products.description: Aluminium cap for all sized DIN18 glass dropper bottles. An ideal choice for brands looking for a plastic alternative to their packaging.

products.name: 2 Cell Screen Panel: R1R1 and R2R2
products.description: We are proud to be the international distributor for NHSBT Red Cell Screening Panels for use in transfusion medicine, criminology and paternity testing. products.name: vivoPHIX™ (20ml) - RNA stabilisation solution for single cell analysis
products.description: vivo PHIX™ is an RNA stabilisation reagent that can be used for cell fixation all the way through to downstream multi-omic applications, such as scRNA-seq and SMART-seq. It's unique properties enable biomolecule stabilisation (RNA, DNA, phosphoproteins), cell fixation, tissue dissociation and viral/bacterial inactivation. vivo PHIX™ offers the same stabilisation benefits as geno PHIX™ with the extra advantage of enabling dissociation of biomolecules from tissue for single cell analysis. Download RNAssist Brochure vivoPHIX MSDS

products.name: HemoPHIX™ (15ml) - RNA stabilisation solution for Liquid blood samples
products.description: Hemo PHIX™ is an RNA stabilisation reagent that can be used for cell fixation all the way through to downstream multi-omic applications, such as scRNA-seq and SMART-seq. It's unique properties enable biomolecule stabilisation (RNA, DNA, phosphoproteins), cell fixation, tissue dissociation and viral/bacterial inactivation. Hemo PHIX™ offers the same stabilisation benefits as geno PHIX™ with the extra advantage of being optimised for liquid Blood Samples. Download RNAssist Brochure

products.name: HIV 1.2 Rapid Test - D-HIVUD25
products.description: Intended Use: The HIV 1.2 Rapid Test (Urine) is a rapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of antibodies to Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV) type 1 and type 2 in urine to aid in the diagnosis of HIV infection. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: HIV 1.2.O and p24 Combo Rapid Test Device - D-HIVAGABD20
products.description: The HIV 1.2.O and p24 Combo Rapid Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) is a rapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of HIV type 1 antibody, type 2 antibody, Subtype O antibody and type 1 p24 antigen in human whole blood, serum or plasma specimen to aid in the diagnosis of HIV infection. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: HIV 1.2 Rapid Test Device - D-HIVRC20
products.description: Intended Use: The HIV 1.2 Rapid Test (Oral Fluid) is a rapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of antibodies to Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV) type 1 and type 2 in human oral fluid to aid in the diagnosis of HIV infection. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: HIV 1.2 Home Rapid Test Device (For self-testing) - D-HIVUD1
products.description: Intended Use: The HIV 1.2 Home Rapid Test (Urine) is a rapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of antibodies to Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV) type 1 and type 2 in urine to aid in the diagnosis of HIV infection. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: HIV 1.2 Rapid Test (For self-testing) - D-HIVWBSTD20
products.description: Intended Use: The HIV 1.2 Rapid Test (Whole Blood) is arapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of antibodies to Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV) type 1 and type 2 in human whole blood to aid in the diagnosis of HIV infection. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: HIV 1.2 Home Rapid Test (For self-testing) - D-HIVRC1
products.description: Intended Use: The HIV 1.2 Home Rapid Test (Oral Fluid) is a rapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of antibodies to Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV) type 1 and type 2 in human oral fluid to aid in the diagnosis of HIV infection. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: SARS-CoV-2/Influenza A+B/RSV/AdenovirusAntigen Combo Rapid Test - D-SCIABRSVAA20
products.description: Intended Use: The SARS-CoV-2/Influenza A+B/RSV/Adenovirus Antigen Combo Rapid Test (Nasopharyngeal Swab) is a rapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of SARS-CoV-2 Nucleocapsid protein, Influenza A, Influenza B, Respiratory Syncytial Virus(RSV) and Adenovirus antigens in nasopharyngeal swab specimens from individuals with suspected SARS-CoV-2/Influenza/RSV/Adenovirus infection in conjunction with clinical presentation and the results of other laboratory tests. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: Salmonella typhi and paratyphi B Antigen Combo Rapid Test - D-STPBD10
products.description: Intended Use: The Salmonella typhi and paratyphi B antigen Combo Rapid Test is an in-vitro diagnostic rapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of Salmonella typhi and paratyphi B antigen in human feces as an aid in the diagnostic of Salmonella Typhi and paratyphi B infections. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: Shigella Rapid Test Device - D-SHID20
products.description: Intended Use: The Shigella Rapid Test Device (Feces) is a rapid chromatographic immunoassay for the qualitative detection of Shigella flexneri and Shigella sonnei in human feces. Product Advantages: Easy specimen collection Simple operation, no equipment required Easy visual interpretationo Fast results in 10 minutes assay time High accuracy (99.9%)

products.name: D-HCGPD - Digital hCG Pregnancy Test
products.description: For Professional in vitro Diagnostic Use

products.name: D-EHCGPD - Digital Early Pregnancy Test
products.description: Intended use: The Digital Early Pregnancy Test is a fast and easy-to-use, pregnancy test. lt is used for the qualitative detection of hCG in human urine. Principle: During testing, the specimen reacts with the particle coated with specific antibodies. The mixture migrates upward on the membrane chromatographically by capillary action to react with specific captureantibodies on the membrane and generate a colored line on test strip. Theresult signal is converted to electrical signal by photodiode, and thencalculated by software to display in LCD. Product features: Early Detection of Pregnancy Easy to Use with 1 Step Operation Clear Visual interpretation Fast Result in 3 Minutes

products.name: Fluorescencelmmunoassay Analyzer — RL-AFR-300
products.description: Product Description: Principle: Fluorescence Immunoassay Format: Device Measurement: Quantitative, Qualitative Read Time: < 20 seconds Test Time: Ref: Analytes Specimen: Ref: Specific Package Insert Power Supply: DC 18V 2 A Adapter Input: AC 100-240V 50/60 Hz Dimension: 285 mm*130 mm*100 mm (L*W*H) Screen size: 7 inches Weight: ＜1.5 kg Spectrum: Excitation spectrum: Mean wavelength λ0=365nm Reception spectrum: Mean wavelength λ1=610nm Memory: 10,000 records Printer: Built-in thermal printer Ports: LAN×1, USB×1, Type-Cx1

products.name: D-FIPNEUD20-Mycoplasma pneumoniae Antigen Test Device
products.description: For professional in vitro diagnostic use only.

products.name: D-FILPD10/ D-FILPD25-Legionella pneumophila Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Legionella pneumophila Test Device (Urine) is intended for in vitro qualitative detection of Legionella pneumophila antigens in human urine to aid in the rapid differential diagnosis of Legionella pneumophila infections. Principle: The Legionella pneumophila Test Device (Urine) detects antigen of Legionella pneumophila virus in urine specimen based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. The sample moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. If the specimen contains Legionella pneumophila antigens, it attaches to the fluorescent microspheres conjugated Legionella pneumophila antibodies. Then the complex will be captured by the capture antibodies coated on the nitrocellulose membrane (Test line). The concentration of Legionella pneumophila antigens in the sample correlates with the fluorescence signal intensity captured on the T line, which can be scanned by Fluorescence Immunoassay Analyzer. The testing result of Legionella pneumophila antigens will display on the Fluorescence Immunoassay Analyzer screen. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIADNSD20- Adenovirus pneumoniae Antigen Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Adenovirus pneumoniae Antigen Test Device (Nasopharyngeal Swab) is a test based on fluorescence immunoassay for the qualitative detection of human Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen in human nasopharyngeal swab specimens from individuals with suspected Adenovirus pneumoniae infection in conjunction with clinical presentation and the results of other laboratory tests. Principle: The Adenovirus pneumoniae Antigen Test Device (Nasopharyngeal Swab) is a qualitative membrane-based Fluorescence immunoassay for the qualitative detection of Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen in human nasopharyngeal swab specimen. Adenovirus antibodies are coated in test line region. During testing, the specimen reacts with Adenovirus antibody-coated by fluorescent microspheres in the test; the mixture then migrates upward on the membrane by capillary action and reacts with the Adenovirus antibodies in test line region. According to the fluorescence intensity of the test and the standard curve, the concentration of Adenovirus pneumonia antigen in the sample can be calculated and reported by the analyzer. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIARNSD20-Adenovirus pneumoniae and RSV Combo Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Adenovirus pneumoniae and RSV Combo Test Device (Nasopharyngeal Swab) is a test based on fluorescence immunoassay for the qualitative detection of human Adenovirus pneumoniae andRespiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) antigen in human nasopharyngeal swab specimens from individuals with suspected Adenovirus pneumoniae and RSV infection in conjunction with clinical presentation and the results of other laboratory tests. Principle: The Adenovirus pneumoniae and RSV Combo Rapid Test Device (Nasopharyngeal Swab) is a qualitative membrane-based Fluorescence immunoassay for the detection of Adenovirus pneumoniae and RSV antigen in human nasopharyngeal swab specimen. The membrane is pre-coated with anti Adenovirus pneumoniae antibody on the Adenovirus pneumoniae test line region and anti-RSV antibody on the RSV test line region of the test. During testing, the sample moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. The RSV antigen and Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen in the specimen will be combined with the RSV antibody and Adenovirus pneumoniae antibody that has been conjugated with fluorescence microspheres. The mixture migrates upward on the membrane chromatographically by capillary action to react with anti-RSV antibody and anti- Adenovirus pneumoniae antibody on the membrane. The concentration of RSV antigen and Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen in the sample is positively related to the intensity of the fluorescent signalcaptured on the T line. According to the fluorescence intensity of the test and the standard curve, the concentration of RSV and Adenovirus pneumoniae in the sample can be calculated and reported by the analyzer. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Application

products.name: D-FIARID20- Adenovirus pneumoniae/RSV/Influenza A+B Combo Test Device (Multiple windows)
products.description: Intended use： The Adenovirus pneumoniae /RSV/Influenza A+B Combo Test Device (Nasopharyngeal Swab) is intended for the in vitro qualitative detection of Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) antigen and Influenza A and B antigens in human nasopharyngeal swab specimens. Principle:The Adenovirus pneumoniae /RSV/Influenza A+B Combo Test Device (Nasopharyngeal Swab) is a qualitative membrane-based Fluorescence immunoassay for the detection of Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, RSV antigen and Influenza A and B antigens in human nasopharyngeal swab specimen. In this test, antibody specific to the Adenovirus pneumoniae , RSV, Influenza A or Influenza B antibody is coated on the test line regions of the test device. During testing, the sample moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. The Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, RSV antigen and Influenza A and B antigens in the specimen will be combined with the Adenovirus pneumoniae , RSV, Influenza A or Influenza B antibody that has been conjugated with fluorescence microspheres. The mixture migrates upward on the membrane chromatographically by capillary action to react with Adenovirus pneumoniae , RSV, Influenza A or Influenza B antibody on the membrane. The concentration of the Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, RSV antigen and Influenza A and B antigens in the sample is positively related to the intensity of the fluorescent signal captured on the T line. According to the fluorescence intensity of the test and the standard curve, the concentration of the Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, RSV antigen and Influenza A and B antigens in the sample can be calculated and reported by the analyzer. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIRICD20- RSV/Influenza A+B/COVID-19 Combo Test Device (Multiple windows)
products.description: Intended use：The RSV/Influenza A+B/COVID-19 Combo Test Device (Nasopharyngeal Swab) is intended for the in vitro qualitative detection of Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) antigen, Influenza A and B antigens, SARS-CoV-2 nucleocapsid protein in nasopharyngeal swab specimens. Principle : The RSV/Influenza A+B/COVID-19 Combo Test Device is a test to qualitatively detect the RSV antigen, Influenza A and B antigens and SARS-CoV-2 nucleocapsid protein in nasopharyngeal swab specimens based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIRT4D20-Adenovirus pneumoniae/RSV/Influenza A+B/ COVID-19 Combo Test Device (Multiple windows)
products.description: Intended use： The Adenovirus pneumoniae /RSV/Influenza A+B/COVID-19 Combo Test Device is intended for the in vitro qualitative detection of Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) antigen, Influenza A and B antigens, SARS-CoV-2 nucleocapsid protein in nasopharyngeal swab specimens. Principle : The Adenovirus pneumoniae /RSV/Influenza A+B/COVID-19 Combo Test Device is a test to qualitatively detect the Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, RSV antigen, Influenza A and B antigens and SARS-CoV-2 nucleocapsid protein in nasopharyngeal swab specimens based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIRT6D20-Adenovirus pneumoniae/RSV/influenza A+B/COVID- 19/HMPV/HPV Combo Test Device (Multiple windows)
products.description: Intended use： The Adenovirus pneumoniae /RSV/Influenza A+B/COVID-19/HMPV/HPIV Combo Test Device is intended for the in vitro qualitative detection of Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) antigen, Influenza A and B antigens, SARS-CoV-2 nucleocapsid protein,Human Metapneumovirus (HMPV) antigens and human parainfluenza virus (HPIV) antigens in nasopharyngeal swab specimens. Principle: The Adenovirus pneumoniae /RSV/Influenza A+B/COVID-19/HMPV/HPIV Combo Test Device is a Test to qualitatively detect the Adenovirus pneumoniae antigen, RSV antigen, Influenza A and B antigens,SARS-CoV-2 nucleocapsid protein, HMPV antigens and HPIV antigens in nasopharyngeal swab specimens based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIDAGMD10/D-FIDAGMD25-Dengue lgG, lgM and NS1 Combo Test Device (Multiple windows)
products.description: Intended use： The Dengue IgG, IgM and NS1 Combo Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) is a fluorescence immunoassay for the qualitative detection of NS1 antigen and IgG and IgM antibodies to Dengue virus in human whole blood, serum, or plasma as an aid in the diagnosis of Dengue infections. Principle: The Dengue IgG, IgM and NS1 Combo Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) detects Dengue NS1 antigen and IgG and IgM antibodies based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIMALD10/ D-FIMALD25-Malaria P.f./P.v./Pan Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Malaria P.f./P.v./Pan Test Device (Whole Blood) is intended for in vitro qualitative detection of antigens of P.falciparum (P.f.), P. vivax (P.v.), P.ovale (P.o.) and P.malariael (P.m.) (P.f., P.v., Pan.) in human whole blood. Principle:The Malaria P.f./P.v./Pan Test Device (Whole Blood) is based on Fluorescence Immunoassay for the detection of the P.f-specific, P. vivax (P.v.) and Pan-malarial antigens (P.f., P.v., P.o. and P.m.) in human blood specimens. The membrane is pre-coated with anti-HRP-II antibodies, anti-p.v. LDH and anti-pan LDH antibodies. The specimen moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. If the specimen contains P.f-specific, P. vivax (P.v.) and Pan-malarial antigens (P.f., P.v., P.o. and P.m.), it attaches to the fluorescent microspheres-conjugated antibodies. Then the complex will be captured by the capture antibodies coated on the nitrocellulose membrane (Test line). Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FITYGMD10/ D-FITYGMD25-Typhoid Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Typhoid Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/ Plasma) is intended for the in vitro qualitative detection of IgG and IgM types of antibodies against Salmonella typhi ( S.typhi ) in human whole blood, serum or plasma, as an aid in the diagnosis of infection with S. typhi . Principle: The Typhoid Test Device (Whole blood/Serum/ Plasma) detects antibodies (IgG and IgM) to Salmonella typhi ( S. typhi ) in human whole blood, serum or plasma specimen based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. The sample moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. If the specimen contains antibodies (IgG and IgM) of S.typhi , it attaches to the fluorescent microspheres conjugated Salmonella typhi antigens. Then the complex will be captured by the capture antibodies coated on the nitrocellulose membrane. The concentration of Salmonella typhi antibodies S. typhi (IgG and IgM) in the sample correlates with the fluorescence signal intensity captured on the T line, The testing result of S. typhi antibodies(IgG and IgM) will display on the analyzer screen. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FINOROD10/ D-FINOROD25-Norovirus Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Norovirus Test Device (Feces) is intended for the in vitro qualitative detection of Norovirus antigen inhuman feces as an aid in the diagnosis of Norovirus infection. Principle: The Norovirus Test Device (Feces) detects Norovirus antigen based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. The sample moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. The Norovirus antigen in the specimen will be combined with the Genogroup 1 and Genogroup 2 specific monoclonal antibodies that have been conjugated with fluorescent microspheres and the combination will be captured by another Genogroup 1 and Genogroup 2 monoclonal antibodies coated on the membrane. The more Norovirus antigen in the specimen, the more fluorescent microspheres will be captured on the membrane. The concentration of Norovirus antigen in the sample is positively related to the intensity of the fluorescent signal captured on the T line. According to the fluorescence intensity of the test and the standard curve, the concentration of Norovirus antigen in the sample can be calculated and reported by the analyzer. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIROTD10/ D-FIROTD25-Rotavirus Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Rotavirus Test Device (Feces) is intended for in vitro qualitative determination of Rotavirus Antigen in human feces. Measurement of Rotavirus Antigen is used as an aid to diagnosis of Rotavirus infection. Principle: The Rotavirus Test Device (Feces) detects Rotavirus Antigen based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. The sample moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. The Rotavirus Antigen in the specimen will be combined with the Rotavirus antibody that has been conjugated with fluorescence microspheres and the combination will be captured by another Rotavirus antibody coated on the membrane. The more Rotavirus Antigen in the specimen, the more fluorescent microspheres will be captured on the membrane. The concentration of Rotavirus Antigen in the sample is positively related to the intensity of the fluorescent signal captured on the T line. According to the fluorescence intensity of the test and the standard curve, the concentration of Rotavirus Antigen in the sample can be calculated and reported by the analyzer. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIADFD10/ D-FIADFD25-Adenovirus Antigen Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Adenovirus Antigen Test Device (Feces) is intended for the in vitro qualitative detection of Adenovirus antigen in human feces. products.name: D-FIROAAGD10/ D-FIROAAGD25-Rotavirus and Adenovirus Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Rotavirus and Adenovirus Combo Test Device (Feces) is intended for the in vitro qualitative detection of Rotavirus antigen and Adenovirus antigen in human feces as an aid in the diagnosis of Rotavirus and/or Adenovirus infection. products.name: D-FIHBSGWBD10 /D-FIHBSGWBD25-HBsAg Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The HBsAg Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) is a fluorescence immunoassay for the quantitative detection of Hepatitis B surface antigen (HBsAg) in human whole blood, serum or plasma specimen. Principle:The HBsAg Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) is a quantitative membrane-based fluorescence immunoassay for the detection of HBsAg in human whole blood, serum or plasma specimen. During testing, the specimen which contain HBsAg conjugated with fluorescence particles in the label pad of the test. Then the mixture migrates upward on the membrane chromatographically by capillary action and reacts with the Anti-HBsAg in test line region of NC membrane. The concentration of HBsAg in the specimen correlates with the fluorescence signal intensity captured on the Test line, which can be scanned by the analyzer. The testing result of HBsAg will display on the Fluorescence Immunoassay Analyzer screen. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIHIVWBD10/ D-FIHIVWBD25-HIV1/2 Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The HIV1/2 Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) is a fluorescence immunoassay for the qualitative detection of HIV1/2 antibodies in human whole blood, serum, or plasma specimen. Principle: The HIV1/2 Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) detects HIV1/2 antibodies based on Fluorescence Immunoassay. The sample moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. If the specimen contains HIV1/2 antibodies, it attaches to the fluorescent microspheres-conjugated HIV1/2 recombinant proteins. Then the complex will be captured by the HIV1 and HIV2 recombinant proteins in test line region. The concentration of HIV1/2 antibodies in the sample correlates with the fluorescence signal intensity captured on the T line, which can be scanned by the analyzer. The testing result of HIV1/2 will display on the Fluorescence Immunoassay Analyzer screen. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIMPOXAGD20-Monkeypox Virus Antigen Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Monkeypox Virus Antigen Test Device is intended for the qualitative detection of Monkeypox Virus antigen in human serum, plasma, whole blood, rash exudate or throat swab specimens to aid in the diagnosis of Monkeypox Virus infection. Principle:The Monkeypox Virus Antigen Test Device detects Monkeypox Virus antigen based on fluorescence immunoassay. The sample moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad. If the specimen contains Monkeypox Virus antigen, it attaches to the fluorescent microspheres-conjugated anti-Monkeypox Virus antibody. products.name: D-FITETD10/ D-FITETD25-Tetanus lgG Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Tetanus IgG Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) is a fluorescence immunoassay for the quantitative detection of Tetanus IgG in human whole blood, serum or plasma specimen. It is intended for use as an aid in identifying the level of anti-tetanus toxin antibodies, to evaluate immune status, in order to determine the necessity of a complementary vaccination which would assure immunity towards tetanus toxin. Principle:The Tetanus IgG Test Device (Whole Blood/Serum/Plasma) is a quantitative membrane-based fluorescence immunoassay for the detection of IgG antibodies to Tetanus toxin in human whole blood, serum or plasma specimen. During testing, the specimen which contain antibodies to Tetanus toxin reacts with Tetanus toxin antigen conjugated with fluorescence particles in the label pad of test. Then the mixture migrates upward on the membrane chromatographically by capillary action and reacts with the anti-human IgG in test line region of NC membrane. The concentration of antibodies to Tetanus toxin in the specimen correlates with the fluorescence signal intensity captured on the Test line, which can be scanned by Fluorescence Immunoassay Analyzer. The testing result of antibodies to Tetanus toxin will display on the Fluorescence Immunoassay Analyzer screen. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.name: D-FIDOAAMPD10/ D-FIDOAAMPD25-Single Drug Amphetamine (AMP) Test Device
products.description: Intended use： The Single Drug Amphetamine (AMP) Test Device (Urine) is a fluorescence immunoassay for the quantitative detection of Amphetamine in human urine. Principle:The Single Drug Amphetamine (AMP) Test Device (Urine) detects drugs based on Fluorescence Immunoassay of competitive binding. Drugs which may be present in the urine specimen compete against the drug conjugate for binding sites on the antibody. The specimen moves through the strip from sample pad to absorbent pad by capillary action. The less drugs in the specimen, the more chance that fluorescent microspheres-conjugated anti-drug antibodies can be captured by the drug antigen coated on the membrane (Test line). The concentration of drug in the specimen is inversely related to the intensity of the fluorescent signal captured on the T line. According to the fluorescence intensity of the test and the standard curve, the concentration of drug in the specimen can be calculated by the analyzer to show drug concentration in urine. Product Features: Extraordinary Sensitivity High Accuracy Wide Dynamic Range Extensive Range of Applications

products.description: The Marijuana(THC) Parent Rapid Test Device(Saliva) is a rapid chromatographicimmunoassay for the detection of Marijuana in human saliva at a cut-off concentration of 3.5 ng/mL. This assay provides only a preliminary test result. A more specific alternate chemical method must be used in order to obtain a confirmed result. products.name: virusPHIX+
products.description: Inactivates all tested viruses and bacteria, including SARS-CoV, Zika, Dengue, m.tuberculosis , and Influenza Long term RNA stabilisation at room temperature Free from guanidine and other toxic chemicals Suitable for swab and saliva testing SARS-CoV inactivation in 10 minutes A recent study from the Roslin Institute in Edinburgh, UK concluded that virus PHIX ™ inactivates SARS-CoV in as little as 10 minutes when treated at a 1:1 sample to reagent ratio at room temperature. Under these conditions, a 10log6 reduction in SARS-CoV virus titre was recorded. 1 month stabilisation of SARS-CoV at room temperature Independent study by Qnostics UK demonstrated that virus PHIX ™ stabilises SARS-CoV virus RNA for at least 33 days at 20°C. Sputum samples spiked with SARS-CoV RNA were analysed over 33 days, and the Ct value was compared with virus PHIX ™ treated samples and control (no stabiliser added) - see below data.

products.name: virusPHIX-LV
products.description: Inactivates all tested viruses and bacteria, including SARS-CoV, Zika, Dengue, m.tuberculosis , and Influenza Long term RNA stabilisation at room temperature Free from guanidine and other toxic chemicals Suitable for swab testing Low viscosity formulation optimised for automated liquid handling platforms (Hamilton, Ortho, Tecan)

products.name: virusPHIX-P9
products.description: Inactivates all tested viruses and bacteria, including SARS-CoV, Zika, Dengue, m.tuberculosis , and Influenza Long term RNA stabilisation at room temperature Non-Toxic Formulation Suitable for swab and saliva samples Recommended as an inactivation and RNA stabilisation media for saliva and swabs, especially when it is necessary to add sample directly into an RT-LAMP, LamPORE or RT-PCR assay without RNA purification*.* virus PHIX-P9™ has been demonstrated to be directly compatible with LAMP assays, please contact us for further information.

products.name: vivoPHIX™ (5 x 10ml) - RNA stabilisation reagent for single cell analysis
products.description: vivo PHIX™ is an RNA stabilisation reagent that can be used for cell fixation all the way through to downstream multi-omic applications, such as scRNA-seq and SMART-seq. It's unique properties enable biomolecule stabilisation (RNA, DNA, phosphoproteins), cell fixation, tissue dissociation and viral/bacterial inactivation. vivo PHIX™ offers the same stabilisation benefits as geno PHIX™ with the extra advantage of enabling dissociation of biomolecules from tissue for single cell analysis. Download RNAssist Brochure vivoPHIX MSDS Sold as a 5 x 10ml pack (50ml total)

products.name: COVID-19 Antigen Rapid Test (Nasal Swab) Self Test
products.description: The COVID-19 Antigen Rapid Test (Nasal Swab) is a single-use test kit intended to detect the SARS-CoV that causes COVID-19 with self-collected nasal swab specimen from symptomatic individuals who are suspected of being infected with COVID-19. This test is designed for home use with self-collected nasal swab samples in individuals who are suspected of COVID-19. The COVID-19 Antigen Rapid Test (Nasal Swab) obtain a preliminary results only, the final confirmation should be based on clinical diagnostic results. Please contact us for availability in your region.

products.name: COVID-19 Antigen Rapid Test (Oral Fluid) Self Test
products.description: The COVID-19 Antigen Rapid Test (Oral Fluid) is a single-use test kit intended to detect the novel coronavirus SARS-CoV that causes COVID-19 in human oral fluid. This test is designed for home use with self-collected oral fluid samples in individuals who are suspected of COVID-19. The COVID-19 Antigen Rapid Test (Oral Fluid) obtain a preliminary results only, the final confirmation should be based on clinical diagnostic results. Please contact us for availability in your region.

Includes a White aluminium screw cap, an ideal choice for brands looking for a plastic alternative to their packaging. Ideal for essential oils, serums and related healthcare/cosmetic applications. Suitability of the bottle for all liquids should nevertheless be tested by the end user. We will be happy to supply free samples to help you with this.

posts.title: Chamrud Enterprise Achieves ISO 9001:2015 Certification
posts.body: We are proud to announce that Chamrud Enterprise has officially achieved ISO 9001:2015 certification. This milestone reflects our commitment to maintaining the highest quality standards in supplying medical and laboratory equipment across Zambia.
